title: H-1B visa revoked: Man says he deeply regrets not paying $600 traffic fine by deadline
summary: An unpaid traffic ticket caused the revocation of an individual's H-1B visa, showcasing the potential consequences of administrative oversights. The man in question said he moved to a new apartment and missed the payment notice.
imageAlt: H-1B visa revoked: Man says he deeply regrets not paying $600 traffic fine by deadline
